title: Successful OCC concluded
description: GEORGE NEWS - A hugely successful 2024 OCC...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A hugely successful 2024 OCC was concluded with a prizegiving and lunch. Race director Alewijn Dippenaar thanked all the sponsors and volunteers for their contribution and the athletes who went to great lengths to attend.


> Pieter du Preez, Paralympic gold medallist, said it was a privilege to participate and praised the organisers and all roleplayers  for their efforts to make a wonderdul event possible for athletes with disabilities.


He said he was inspired by the enthusiasm  of everyone who took part and the warm welcome received in George.

PHOTO GALLERY: 2024 OCC a big success

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
